rationale: Section 21.907 funds mentor stipends through Educ. Code §48.157(b)(5), not directly through homestead exemption values. No reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) or property tax appraisal appears; any fiscal linkage is indirect via school finance formulas.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school shall use money received under Section 48.157(b)(5) to provide stipends for mentor teachers in an amount of at least $1,000.
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district budgets is possible but mediated through Chapter 48 funding formulas, not this provision.
